title: Shape Pressure Into Release
objective: Reduce an exposed high-complexity sonority and preserve a clear release gesture.
prompt: Repair the opening beat so the passage moves from moderate pressure into clearer release. Keep the second beat unless necessary. Prefer the smallest edit that lowers high-complexity warnings.
